content:
What should men wear on a first date? Ugh, what a tough-easy question to answer, right? Right. Knowing what to wear, not only on a date but in general at special events, is sometimes challenging for men. A man who takes his first date seriously wants to make the best possible impression.

When it comes to impressing someone on a first date, it’s hard to figure out what to wear. You can make two possible mistakes: underdressing or trying too hard and overdressing. The Golden Middle? Smart Casual.

You need to look like you haven’t tried too hard, but at the same time, you shouldn’t look like you’ve neglected yourself. Making great first impressions on a first date is essential.

After all, you only get one chance to make it! When it comes to choosing an outfit for a first date, many guys default to dressing up in their best going-out clothes. But what if we told you that there’s a better way?

A way that doesn’t involve wearing your fanciest, most uncomfortable clothes but just casual ones? A way that will help you relax and feel comfortable in your own skin? Looking for date outfit ideas or what should men wear on a first date? Here are some tips.

The first date look – Everything you need to know!

What should men wear on a first date? Stop asking, and we'll help you. The first date is the most important moment in what can be a future relationship! Before going out on a first casual date, remember that the most important part is to be clean and to look clean!

It doesn’t matter if we are talking about daytime dates, movies, coffee dates, dinners, or if you are going to a cocktail bar. On the first date, the most important is to look clean and give an excellent impression. After understanding this, pay attention to the location you’re going on this first date. Then you choose your clothes based on what works best for your body type.

Don’t forget to go to your wardrobe, iron your clothes, and pay attention to your socks! Girls also hate dirty shoes or sneakers, so take care of that too! Women love when a guy pays attention to his appearance and details on the first date!

Never wear a suit and tie - Never

But what should men wear on a first date, then? We know but hear us out. Yes, we know that wearing a suit looks great, but in this case, it’s the biggest mistake you can make. A suit and tie, especially if it’s an office shirt and tie combination. It can make you look formal and give the impression that you’ve just come from work.

It can be taken as a sign that you are obsessed with your career and that you haven’t taken any time for dating. That’s not a good vibe. Max you can do is put together a collared shirt with pants. After all, the most important thing when you go on date night is to have fun.

Putting some thought into what to wear instead what to say about yourself, can make a difference. Don't let formality get in the way of comfort. After all, you're on a date - not at an office boardroom meeting! Pick something stylish that allows for relaxed vibes and fun conversation without worrying about unnecessary dress codes or ties!

Flirt with a T-shirt and pants - throw a bomber jacket as well

Remember that a man who advocates a half-smart, half-casual wrinkle-free t-shirt and pants outfit is worth a second date. Black or brown trousers, a printed shirt, and neutral colors are perfect. Two things are essential: fit and protection of the garment.

When looking for a winning look on your first date, the classic combination of wrinkle-free trousers and a T-shirt can make all the difference. Make sure that you pick pieces that fit well! Opt to complete your outfit with black or brown trousers plus a printed shirt in neutral colors. Trust us, it'll guarantee success when seeking that coveted second rendezvous!

Denim and only denim - Style rules

Jeans are always the perfect go-to when you want to look your best. Whether they be stylish blue or classic gray, opt for a pair that fits like it was made especially for you! While some may prefer their jeans skinny, don't forget - first impressions matter!

Try jazzing up your wardrobe with a denim jacket! Not only is it the perfect weight for warmer weather, but its longevity means you can wear it season after season. With jeans being such an iconic garment, this versatile item of clothing makes any summer look complete.

Give your jeans an instant upgrade with a simple t-shirt and crisp, clean sneakers. Whether it's short sleeves or long - color coordination is key for making sure the pieces match perfectly!

If you don't know what men should wear on a first date: Dress casually!

A casual first date speaks volumes about your self-assurance, relaxed attitude, and down-to-earth nature. It sends the message that you're eager to connect with someone in an uncomplicated way. No need for grand entrances or showy displays!

A casual outfit for date night calls for casual shoes. Go ahead and ditch that leather jacket in favor of a comfortable t-shirt, polo shirt, or button-down collar. Add your favorite pair of pants to complete the look and go on date night. You'll be sure to impress!

Tip: If you're feeling too casual go for a wrinkle-free dress shirt. Date outfits don't need must follow formulas but you should aim to make a good impression.

Black is the New Black

What should men wear on a first date? First, black is the key to fashion success. Show off your style savvy and feel confident with this timeless hue. You can dress this color up or down for any occasion. Not just a wardrobe winner – black has serious slimming power. It gives you an extra air of sophistication while still being casual enough not to worry about what to wear!

Second, on a first date, wearing all black is always the way to go. Not only does it keep you on trend and looking chic no matter the current fashion cycle. Its slimming effect makes sure that you leave your dates with both an impression of style and poise!

Black: the go-to for any occasion. No matter if you're dressing up or down, black makes it easy to accessorize in style. Just add a few statement pieces! Plus, no worries about wrinkles and stains--making this dark hue your low-maintenance look of choice.

Seal the first date in style

Don’t think we forgot to give you some shoe suggestions. What shoes should men wear? You know they are as important as all the clothes you have. For example, classic leather shoes are ideal for the first casual-smart outfit. As for jeans and T-shirts, semi-serious sneakers are perfect. They add value to your style.

Why leather shoes?

What should men wear on a first date? Look, classic leather shoes match everything, and there’s no doubt about that. They are like jeans. However, they scream for a combination with a casual or serious shirt. When choosing shoes, first respect the dress codes and the place where you will go out for the first date. Attach with the overall aesthetic—matching your pants with a nice pair of shoes.

Are Ripped jeans still cool?

Ripped jeans are all the rage and have been for some time! Not only do they give off a cool rock star vibe, but their stylish yet comfortable look means you can wear them to just about any casual event. However, if your date isn't so into fashion trends it might be best to save these bad boys for another day. Don't want to send the wrong message now!

What should men wear on a first date? Don't be afraid to express yourself! If a pair of shoes catches your eye, don’t let traditional style get in the way. Rock them with confidence and team it up with an awesome t-shirt for that perfect look you desire.

What about a hoodie, white sneakers, and a white T-shirt?

While some women look overly dressed on their first date, the majority of men tend to be underdressed. Are you one of those guys who always wears a hoodie? We think that if you wear a hoodie, you’ll give the impression that you want to put forth any effort to look decent on your first date.

The only way it would be appropriate to wear a hoodie on the first date would be if you guys were meeting outdoors, only going for a walk or doing any sporty activity. Even then, it’s better to choose a nice shirt.

On the other hand, white shirts are a ‘yes’

but it always depends on how you put together the outfit. It can go wrong if you choose one ugly color for the pants, but otherwise, it’s fine! Wearing white sneakers is always a good idea. They will look good, especially on a daytime date in a day with nice weather!

Pay attention to your hair

After you pick your first date outfit, it’s time to take care of your hair! Always, always take a shower before your first date.

After that, we recommend you style your hair the way you always do. A first date is not the right time to experiment with hair. So, don’t go crazy. If you want to look good, just wash and brush your hair. Don’t give the impression that you are trying too hard! Don’t forget that you need to look presentable.

Accessories

They can complete your casual outfit and make it look way cooler and better. On a sunny day, a nice watch and a pair of sunglasses can be the best classic combo you need! You will look classy if you wear a nice scarf or hat that keeps you warm on a cold day. That pairs with one of your best sweaters.

Honestly,  it’s crucial to pick neutral colors when it comes to accessories. This way, you will give a better impression and look sophisticated! You need to understand that this is not just another night out with the guys at the club. If you want to start dating, start by impressing that girl with how you put your outfit together!

Just a spritz of cologne or perfume

What perfume should men wear on a first date? Everyone wants to be remembered for the right reasons on a date, right? Don’t be like those guys who drown in perfume and cologne on the first date. And then you wonder why you don’t hear from the girl again afterward

When choosing a perfume or cologne, go for flavors that resonate well with your body and get advice from perfumers. Spray some perfume in the air, your hair, and your shirt, and move. This way, the perfume doesn’t stick to your outfits. A little perfume under the ears, and you are ready for the first date. Success!

On the other hand, white shirts are a ‘yes’

Conclusion for what should men wear on a first date

Straight-leg jeans - Joking, of course. First impressions always matter, and there's no denying that your first-date outfit deserves special consideration! It should be something you feel confident in.

But don't forget to think about context. For a fancy dinner date, choosing the right night outfits or investing the extra time into putting together a good outfit can make all the difference.

When it's time to hit the town, you want your look to say, "I'm relaxed yet polished"! Let your style be expressed. Remember that ladies love it when a guy makes an effort. Get some advice from your closest friend, and keep in mind that subtle details can make all the difference. So, what should men wear on a first date? Sometimes less is more!

What should men wear on a first date? Confidence and good clothes. We hope these outfit ideas help you choose the right t-shirts, pants, and shoes for a casual or fancy date! After you read this blog, we’re sure you’ll be well-dressed for your next first date! Go relaxed! Now it’s time to focus on the conversation! We’re sure you’ll have an amazing first date.
